data_quality_notes: NASA POWER API was unavailable. World Bank search found no direct solar irradiance indicator. Fell back to latitude-derived geometric solar proxy: SW ≈ 200 + 200*cos(|lat|) W/m². This is a deterministic first-order approximation of annual mean surface irradiance. Results reflect the latitude–ozone relationship rather than measured irradiance.
summary: Tested solar radiation intensity (latitude-derived geometric proxy) as a proxy for ozone exposure in Key Biodiversity Areas (OEB). Bivariate: Pearson r=-0.276 (p=6.769e-60), Spearman rho=-0.508 (p=1.503e-219). Partial correlation controlling for log(GPC): r=-0.123 (p=1.382e-12). Best functional form: quadratic. Hypothesis predicts positive direction (higher solar → more photochemical ozone production). N=3360 obs across 168 countries.
